zh.Of,Hanmer,Flintshire,England: 英國威爾斯福林爾韓麥
zh.St. Chad Churchyard, Hanmer, , Wrexham,: 英國威爾斯萊可哈姆霍爾特聖 查德 亞德

zh.of Yr Owredd,Hanmer,Flintshire,Wales: 英國威爾斯福林爾韓麥
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Hanmer於大約1475年出生在威爾士福林爾韓麥時，他的父親Richard Hanmer35歲，母親Margaret Kynaston14歲。他於1502年之前與Anne Watson在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1545年2月10日在他的家鄉享年71歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯萊可哈姆霍爾特聖 查德 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Hanmer于大约1475年出生在威尔士福林爾韓麥时，他的父亲Richard Hanmer35岁，母亲Margaret Kynaston14岁。他于1502年之前与Anne Watson在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1545年2月10日在他的家乡享年71岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯萊可哈姆霍爾特聖 查德 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Hanmer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: habitational name from Hanmer (Flintshire), named with the Old English personal name Hagena + Old English mere ‘lake, pond’. A daughter of Sir David Hanmer, a Welsh judge in the 14th century, was married to the Welsh ruler Owen Glendower, who led the revolt against Henry IV's rule in Wales.
English: habitational name from Anmer (Norfolk), from Old English æned ‘duck’ + mere ‘lake, pond’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Hanmer was born about 1475, in Hanmer, Flintshire, Wales, his father, Richard Hanmer, was 35 and his mother, Margaret Kynaston, was 14. He married Anne Watson before 1502, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 10 February 1545, in his hometown, at the age of 71, and was buried in Saint Chad Churchyard, Holt, Wrexham, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Hanmer est né environ 1475, à Hanmer, Flintshire, Galles, son père, Richard Hanmer, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Kynaston, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Anne Watson avant 1502, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 10 février 1545, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Saint Chad Churchyard, Holt, Wrexham, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.St. Chad Churchyard, Hanmer, , Wrexham,: Saint Chad Churchyard, Holt, Wrexham, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Hanmer um 1475 in Hanmer, Flintshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Hanmer 35 und seine Mutter Margaret Kynaston 14. Er hat vor 1502 in Wales, United Kingdom Anne Watson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Februar 1545 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Saint Chad Churchyard, Holt, Wrexham, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Anne Watson prima del 1502, nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Hanmerが約1475年にウェールズフリントシュアイアハンマーで生まれた時，父Richard Hanmerは35歳，母Margaret Kynastonは14歳であった。1502年以前にイギリスウェールズでAnne Watsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1545年2月10日に故郷で71歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズウレクスハムホルトサイント チャド チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Chad Churchyard, Hanmer, , Wrexham,: 영국 웨일스 레스함 홀트 세인트 채드 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Hanmer(이)가 대략 1475년 웨일스 플린츠히르 핸머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Hanmer(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Kynaston(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1502년 이전 영국 웨일스에서 Anne Watson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1545년 2월 10일 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 레스함 홀트 세인트 채드 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Hanmer nasceu aproximadamente 1475, em Hanmer, Flintshire, Gales, seu pai, Richard Hanmer, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Kynaston, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Watson antes 1502, em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1545, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint Chad Churchyard, Holt, Wrexham, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.St. Chad Churchyard, Hanmer, , Wrexham,: сеинт чэд чурчярд, холт, рексхам, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Hanmer родился около 1475 г. в местности ханмир, флинцхир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Richard Hanmer было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Kynaston, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Watson перед 1502 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 10 февраля 1545 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности сеинт чэд чурчярд, холт, рексхам, Уэльс, Великобритания.

Se casó con Anne Watson antes de 1502, en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 10 de febrero de 1545, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Saint Chad Churchyard, Holt, Wrexham, Gales, Reino Unido.
